channel.title: Bank on YOJNA PORTAL 2026 - Govt Schemes & Sarkari Job Updates Daily
channel.description: Recent content in Bank on YOJNA PORTAL 2026 - Govt Schemes & Sarkari Job Updates Daily

item.title: Punjab & Sind Bank Apply Online for 2026
item.description: Punjab & Sind Bank has released a notification for 1000 Local Bank Officer (JMGS-I) posts. Candidates with graduation and banking experience can apply online from 31 March 2026 to 20 April 2026. The selection will be based on written exam, interview, and local language test.

item.title: IDBI Bank Specialist Officer SO Vacancy 2026
item.description: IDBI Bank ne Specialist Officer (SO) Recruitment 2026-27 ke liye official notification release kiya hai. Is recruitment ke through total 33 posts fill ki jayengi, jisme IT, Risk Management, Audit aur Security Officer jaise roles include hain. Online application process 25 March 2026 se start ho chuka hai aur last date 08 April 2026 hai. Interested aur eligible candidates official website ke through online apply kar sakte hain.

item.title: BOB Professional WMS Vacancy 2026
item.description: Bank of Baroda WMS Recruitment 2026 has been released for 104 posts in the Wealth Management Services department. Eligible candidates with relevant experience can apply online from 27 March 2026 to 16 April 2026. Graduation is mandatory, and experience in the related field is required. The selection process may include an online test and/or interview. Interested candidates should apply before the last date through the official website.

item.title: UP Co-operative Bank Vacancy 2026 Apply Online
item.description: UP Cooperative Bank Recruitment 2026 has been released by UPCISB for 116 posts including Manager, Junior Manager, Assistant/Cashier, Assistant Typist and Assistant Engineer. The online application process will start from 25 March 2026 and continue till 15 April 2026. This is a special recruitment for SC and OBC candidates of Uttar Pradesh. Eligible candidates can apply online through the official website. The selection process includes an online examination and interview/skill test depending on the post.
